title: Prescription of right to contest proceedings
doc_html:
§4049.  Prescription of right to contest proceedings

After the expiration of sixty days from the publication of the ordinance accepting the work, no person shall have the right to contest the regularity, formality, or validity of any proceedings under the provisions of this Sub-part.
doc_text:
§4049.  Prescription of right to contest proceedings
After the expiration of sixty days from the publication of the ordinance accepting the work, no person shall have the right to contest the regularity, formality, or validity of any proceedings under the provisions of this Sub-part.
